settings.text:
Need help?

At Avoriah Oxford, we believe that great service is just as important as beautiful style. Our customer care team is here to support you with kindness, clarity, and attention to detail.

Whether you have a question about a product, need help placing an order, or want assistance with a return, we are here to make the process simple and reassuring.

You can reach us seven days a week.

Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Saturday and Sunday: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM 

Email: info@avoriahoxford.com

We look forward to assisting you.
